subject: Using AAF release Frankfurt dockers
commit_message:
Using AAF release Frankfurt dockers

Uplifting AAF to 2.1.22 (Frankfurt)

Issue-ID: AAF-1127
Signed-off-by: ChrisC <christophe.closset@intl.att.com>

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> > Patch Set 1:
> > 
> > Gitlab Orange 4: 
> > Full results can be seen here: https://gating-results.onap.eu/results//107854-1/index.html
> 
> 
On Frankfurt the healthcheck and E2E tests are OK (see daily results)
         HC        E2E Tests
20/5    100%         80%
26/5    100%         60%

On Master the tests used to be better, the gate is partially broken since the 21st
         HC         E2E tests
18/5    100            60
19/5     60            60
20/5     60            20
21/5     83            80
22/5     16            20
23/5     33            20
24/5     16            20
25/5     33            20

E2E tests depend on lots of components, Healthcheck Tests are more focused on components.
We can see that on Master we moved down to 33% after the 21st
we got 403 and 401 instead of expected 200..
I see 2 main changes
AAF 2.1.20 => 2.1.22
AAi (shema-service) 1.6.8 => 1.6.9
 
I am looking for the patch 0 wich triggers a regression on these tests, and so far the AAF uplifting to 2.1.22 is a good candidate...

the test of this patchset (cherry pick from master) seems to confirm it
https://gating-results.onap.eu/results/107854-1/

HC   E2E
33%   0%

oom_redeploy to confirm
